---
title: "How to sell your journal: The secret business of academic journal acquisitions"
date: 2023-10-28
description: "A revealing look at the business practices behind academic journal acquisitions and what they mean for scholarly communication."
categories: [Opinions, Scholarly Communication]
---

*Content to be migrated from [pandelisperakakis.info](https://pandelisperakakis.info/2023/10/28/how-to-sell-your-academic-journal-and-for-how-much/).*

<!-- Paste the full post content here -->
